title: Constellation Brands, Inc. (STZ) CEO Bill Newlands on Q1 2023 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Constellation Brands, Inc. (NYSE:STZ ) Q1 2023 Results Conference Call June 30, 2022 10:30 AM ET Company Participants Patty Yahn-Urlaub - Senior Vice President of Investor Relations Bill Newlands - Chief Executive Officer Garth Hankinson - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Bryan Spillane - Bank of America Bonnie Herzog - Goldman Sachs Dana Mohsenian - Morgan Stanley Chris Carey - Wells Fargo Securities Lauren Lieberman - Barclays Nadine Sarwat - Bernstein Rob Ottenstein - Evercore ISI Andrea Teixeira - JPMorgan Bill Chappell - Truist Securities Operator Good morning, and welcome to the Constellation Brands First Quarter Fiscal Year 2023 Earnings Call. [Operator Instructions] As a reminder, this conference is being recorded.

title: Constellation Brands (STZ) Beats Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Constellation Brands (STZ) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 5.98% and 7.99%, respectively, for the quarter ended May 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Constellation Brands Q1 Earnings Top Estimates; Plans To Eliminate Class B Common Stock
text: Constellation Brands Inc (NYSE: STZ) reported first-quarter FY23 growth sales of 17% year-on-year to $2.4 billion, beating the consensus of $2.16 billion. Net sales for the Beer segment grew 21% Y/Y to $1.89 billion, and Wine and Spirits rose 2% Y/Y to $465 million.

title: Constellation Brands plan to eliminate Class B stock would boost Class A shares outstanding by about 14%
text: Constellation Brands Inc. STZ, -0.77% said Thursday it will seek shareholder approval to eliminate its higher-vote Class B shares, which would end the associated voting control of the Sands Family and simplify the equity capital structure. Class B shares entitle holders to 10 votes per share, while Class A shares represent one share.

title: Constellation Brands Announces Agreement With Sands Family to Eliminate Class B Common Stock
text: Agreement provides multiple benefits including Corporate governance enhancements and operating cost savings Agreement provides multiple benefits including Corporate governance enhancements and operating cost savings

title: Constellation Brands swings to a profit, adj. 2022 view beats target
text: Constellation Brands Inc. STZ, -0.77% shares rose 1% in premarket trades Thursday after it said its first-quarter net income increased to $389.5 million, or $2.06 a share, from a loss of $908.1 million, or $4.74 a share, in the year-ago quarter. Adjusted profit was $2.90 a share excluding losses of 24 cents a share from its investment in cannabis company Canopy Growth Corp. CGC, -3.05% WEED, -3.23%.

title: Constellation Brands Reports First Quarter Fiscal 2023 Financial Results
text: VICTOR, N.Y., June 30, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Constellation Brands, Inc. (NYSE: STZ and STZ.B), a leading beverage alcohol company, reported today its first quarter fiscal 2023 financial results. A conference call to discuss the financial results and outlook will be hosted by President and Chief Executive Officer, Bill Newlands, and Chief Financial Officer, Garth Hankinson, on Thursday, June 30, 2022 at 10:30 a.m. EDT. Visit ir.cbrands.com to locate information for joining the conference call or a live, listen-only webcast of the conference call.

title: Constellation Brands Announces Exchange of Canopy Notes
text: VICTOR, N.Y., June 29, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Constellation Brands, Inc. (NYSE: STZ and STZ.B), a leading beverage alcohol company, announced today that its indirect, wholly-owned subsidiary, Greenstar Canada Investment Limited Partnership (“Greenstar”), has entered into an exchange agreement (the “Exchange Agreement”) with Canopy Growth Corporation (“Canopy”), pursuant to which Greenstar has agreed to sell an aggregate of C$100,000,000 principal amount of outstanding 4.25% senior notes due 2023 (“Notes”) to Canopy in consideration for common shares (“Common Shares”) in the capital of Canopy (other than in respect of accrued but unpaid interest which will be paid in cash). The transaction forms part of an exchange by Canopy of an aggregate of approximately C$255,373,000 principal amount of Notes held by certain holders, including Greenstar (together, the “Exchanging Holders”) into Common Shares.

text: Brown-Forman (BF.B) and Coca-Cola to offer customers Jack & Coke RTD canned cocktails. The move is also a step toward leveraging Coca-Cola's brand presence to expand worldwide.

title: Brown-Forman B (BF.B) Surpasses Q4 Earnings and Revenue Estimates

title: Constellation Brands to Report First Quarter Fiscal 2023 Financial Results; Host Conference Call June 30, 2022
text: VICTOR, N.Y., June 02, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Constellation Brands, Inc. (NYSE: STZ and STZ.B), a leading beverage alcohol company, announced today it will report financial results for its first quarter ended May 31, 2022, on Thursday, June 30, 2022, before the open of the U.S. markets. A conference call to discuss the financial results and outlook will be hosted by President and Chief Executive Officer, Bill Newlands, and Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, Garth Hankinson, at 10:30 a.m. EDT, June 30, 2022.
